pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 11 to 17 to target the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 11 semantics, failing to utilize Java 17 features or enforce Java 17 compatibility checks.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated source/target compiler configuration with the unified release flag.
pom.xml.why_exists: The source and target options are deprecated in newer compiler plugin versions and may be removed; using release ensures consistent language level and bootstrap classpath for Java 17.
